cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out which option is most similar to Georgia O'Keeffe's relationship with nature. Let me start by reading the passage again to make sure I understand her story. O'Keeffe was born in Wisconsin, grew up on a farm, left at 17 to study art, but always had a strong connection to the land. She painted nature, simplified portrayals of it.
